inputs.label: Inner Radius
inputs.businessContext: Inner radius of the cylinder (set to 0 for solid cylinder)

businessContext_i18n.en: Inner radius of the cylinder (set to 0 for solid cylinder)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Silindirin iç yarıçapı (dolu silindir için 0 girin)
businessContext_i18n.de: Innenradius des Zylinders (bei Vollzylinder auf 0 setzen)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rayon intérieur du cylindre (0 pour cylindre plein)
businessContext_i18n.es: Radio interior del cilindro (0 para cilindro macizo)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نصف القطر الداخلي للأسطوانة (اضبط على 0 للأسطوانة الصلبة)

inputs.label: Height / Length
inputs.businessContext: Height or length of the cylinder

businessContext_i18n.en: Height or length of the cylinder

inputs.label: Include Annular Ends
inputs.businessContext: 1 = include surface area of both annular end faces, 0 = exclude (e.g., open pipe)

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 = include surface area of both annular end faces, 0 = exclude (e.g., open pipe)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 = her iki halka şeklindeki uç yüzeyinin alanını dahil et, 0 = hariç tut (örn. açık boru)
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 = Oberfläche beider ringförmiger Stirnflächen einschließen, 0 = ausschließen (z. B. offenes Rohr)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 = inclure la surface des deux faces d'extrémité annulaires, 0 = exclure (ex. tuyau ouvert)
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 = incluir área superficial de ambas caras anulares, 0 = excluir (ej. tubería abierta)
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 = تضمين مساحة سطح كلا الطرفين الحلقيين، 0 = استبعاد (مثل أنبوب مفتوح)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
